Tarnished warrior. Very accustomed to dying to massive demigods and dodging through poisonous swamps. Guided by grace and accompanied by a spectral steed. 'Maidenless.'

Adventurer with a mind flayer tadpole stuck in my brain. Excellent at rolling 20-sided dice to solve my problems. I travel with a highly eccentric group of companions whom I constantly try to romance.
Spiky-haired teenager. Wields a giant key as a weapon. I travel across various magical animated worlds with a talking duck and a dog who carries a shield, talking a lot about light and darkness.
Billionaire vigilante. I refuse to use guns, but I will gladly drop criminals off gargoyles, break their bones in fluid free-flow combat, and use explosive gel. World's greatest detective.
Loot hoarder and dungeon crawler. I travel deep underground to defeat the Lord of Terror. My primary skill is clicking my mouse thousands of times per hour to collect slightly better armor.
Wagon party leader. Responsible for guiding a group of settlers out West. Excellent at hunting buffalo but terrible at river fording. I frequently watch my entire party die of dysentery.
Hulking COG soldier. I spend most of my time hiding behind waist-high concrete walls and aggressively chainsawing subterranean locust monsters with my assault rifle.
Iron Fist Tournament competitor. I solve all my family issues by throwing my relatives off cliffs or into volcanoes. Sometimes I fight giant bears, kangaroos, or wooden training dummies.
Secret agent. Famous for looking at my watch to check my health. Very skilled with a silenced PP7 and incredibly frustrating proximity mines in the facility.
Time-traveling swordsman. Accidentally ended up jumping through portals to the past and future. Working with a frog knight, a robot, and a cavewoman to stop a giant alien parasite.
Boy in a striped shirt. Armed with a baseball bat and powerful psychic abilities. I fight hippies, aliens, and cosmic horrors, frequently stopping to call my dad to save my progress.
Blindfolded combat android. Dressed impeccably while fighting machines in a desolate post-apocalyptic Earth. Frequently experiencing existential crises and multiple different endings.
Reanimated prisoner. I am a sentient blob of cells controlling a headless corpse. Very good at dodging and slashing through an ever-changing castle, only to die and start all over again.
Deck-building adventurer. Climbing a massive, procedural tower by playing cards to attack and block. Constantly calculating math to avoid taking damage from bizarre monsters.
Monster hunter. I just walk around slowly while thousands of weapons automatically fire out of my body, collecting blue gems from hordes of enemies until a grim reaper eventually gets me.
